ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Video Presentation, Poster Presentation) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment was last updated */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions for the assessment */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Resources available for the assessment (e.g., video tutorials, guides) */,
  "peer_review_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether peer review is enabled for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the course belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was last updated */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instructor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instructor was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student was last updated */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the criterion was last updated */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the criterion the standard belongs to */,
  "standard_level" TEXT /* Level of the standard (e.g., Below Standard, At Standard, Above Standard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the standard was last updated */,
  "marks_range" TEXT /* Range of marks for the standard (e.g., 0-20, 21-40, 41-60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standards_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who submitted the work */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Pending, Graded, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the submission the feedback belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the criterion the feedback is for */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard the feedback is based on */,
  "marks" REAL /* Marks awarded for the criterion */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the assessor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Instructor, Peer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Instructor, Student) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., View, Submit, Grade) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., resource accessed, submission ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the report is for */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_criteria" (
  "assessment_criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment criterion */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the criterion belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the assessment criterion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_criteria_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_criteria_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)
